rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes require moving valid bindings to implementation annexes
AGREE syntax must align with AADL scope rules and visible identifiers only
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations may only contain assignments valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in component implementation annexes is invalid syntax
Referencing implementation-level paths in component type annexes without proper scope transition
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst extraction of component structure
